queries.question: What are the subjects of all field trips and what are the subjects of interactive webinars with 50 students?
queries.sql:
SELECT Classes.Subject 
FROM Enrollments JOIN Classes ON Classes.ClassID = Enrollments.ClassID
WHERE Enrollments.Educational_Activity = "Field Trip" OR Enrollments.Educational_Activity = "Interactive Webinar" AND Enrollments.Number_of_students = 50
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?subject WHERE {
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?classes a :Classes .
  ?enrollments p:hasClasses ?classes .
  ?classes p:Subject ?subject .
  ?enrollments p:Educational_Activity ?educational_activity_w .
  ?enrollments p:Educational_Activity ?educational_activity_w2 .
  ?enrollments p:Number_of_students ?number_of_students_w .
  FILTER((STR(?educational_activity_w) = "Field Trip" || (STR(?educational_activity_w2) = "Interactive Webinar" && (STR(?number_of_students_w) = "50" || STR(?number_of_students_w) = "50.0"))))
}

queries.question: What are the subjects of field trips and interactive webinars with 50 students?
queries.sql:
SELECT Classes.Subject 
FROM Enrollments JOIN Classes ON Classes.ClassID = Enrollments.ClassID
WHERE (Enrollments.Educational_Activity = "Field Trip" OR Enrollments.Educational_Activity = "Interactive Webinar") AND Enrollments.Number_of_students = 50
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?subject WHERE {
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?classes a :Classes .
  ?enrollments p:hasClasses ?classes .
  ?classes p:Subject ?subject .
  ?enrollments p:Educational_Activity ?educational_activity_w .
  ?enrollments p:Educational_Activity ?educational_activity_w2 .
  ?enrollments p:Number_of_students ?number_of_students_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?educational_activity_w) = "Field Trip" || STR(?educational_activity_w2) = "Interactive Webinar")) && (STR(?number_of_students_w) = "50" || STR(?number_of_students_w) = "50.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the subjects of field trips and interactive webinars with 50 students?
